flags.note: δίκαιος — "righteous" (moral quality) vs. "just" (legal standing). Paul uses this in both senses, and which reading shapes entire doctrines of justification.
πίστις — "faith" (subjective trust) vs. "faithfulness" (objective reliability). "Faith of Christ" (G1342 Χριστοῦ) may mean trust IN Christ or the faithfulness OF Christ.
